hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, status updates, exceptions, customer data and cases into one provider-neutral workflow that supports audit-ready compliance operations across borders.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule workflows slow across borders
problem_description: Cross-border transfers often involve fragmented Travel Rule messages and incomplete originator or beneficiary data. This creates delays and manual exceptions that complicate compliance review and weaken audit evidence for regulated VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes fragmented Travel Rule data, provider outputs and exception cases into a unified compliance workflow that improves cross-border message routing, status tracking and audit-ready evidence for VASPs.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case review
workflow_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, routing status and exceptions into structured cases that support thorough review, evidence preservation and compliance reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond Travel Rule messages. Evidence-ready workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule message outputs, exceptions, routing data, cases and evidence into one provider-neutral workflow for clearer compliance and audit readiness across cross-border transfers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing cross-border Travel Rule workflows with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and scalable deployment for bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support cross-border Travel Rule workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how Travel Rule message routing handles exceptions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports Travel Rule case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY connects originator and beneficiary data
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for cross-border Travel Rule?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects originator, beneficiary, messaging, case and regulatory data into one workflow to help VASPs manage cross-border Travel Rule obligations consistently and transparently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes exceptions into structured case workflows, enabling manual review, status tracking and resolution consistent with internal policies and multi-jurisdiction requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves message logs, decision records, case history and supporting evidence to provide a clear audit trail for Travel Rule compliance review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers to connect routing status, message data and exceptions into a centralized compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting their outputs into workflows and reports without replacing the underlying Travel Rule technology.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one controlled compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
